div1.entryFree: Cancel, vb., to annul, destroy: an expired date, --ed ere well begun, Lucr. 26. --ed my fortunes, Lucr. 26 through her wounds doth fly life's lasting date from --ed destiny, Lucr. 26 weep afresh love's long since --ed woe, Sonn. 30, 7. c. all grudge, Gentl. V, 4, 143. the end of life --s all bands, H4A III, 2, 157. --ing your fame, H6B I, 1, 99. his statutes --ed, H6C V, 4, 79. c. his bond of life, R3 IV, 4, 77. our --ed love, Rom. III, 3, 98. the power to c. his captivity, Caes. I, 3, 102. c. and tear to pieces that great bond, Mcb. III, 2, 49. c. these cold bonds, Cymb. V, 4, 28.
